name: Notice Period
text: The Employee or Employer may terminate this Agreement by providing written notice for the period specified herein or salary in lieu of such notice, subject to applicable law.

legal_basis.note: One month notice or payment in lieu for workmen

invalid_if: Notice period is waived contrary to statutory requirements
title: Notice Period

jurisdiction_constraints.general: IDA 1947 minimum notice = 1 month for workmen; Shops Acts vary state-by-state
jurisdiction_constraints.Karnataka: Karnataka Shops Act notice periods apply to shop employees
jurisdiction_constraints.Maharashtra: Maharashtra Shops Act 1948 S.66 notice obligations apply

dispute_hotspots: Notice buyout — company refuses PILON and forces employee to serve — labour court jurisdiction
Garden leave validity — employee challenges productivity obligation during garden leave
Abscondment — employee leaves without notice — recovery of PILON/training bond
